branding.name: Chitra
branding.instructions: Build a Chat-First AI Workspace. Do NOT build a dashboard. The chat interface is the primary operational surface. Incorporate deep matte backgrounds with high-end glassmorphism and subtle blue/purple rim lights.

headings.usage_rules: Use fluid typography up to text-5xl for main welcome. Never use Inter for headings.

mono.usage: Use for ATS scores, probability rings, AI analytical data, and code/tech specs.

spacing_and_layout.chat_container: col-span-1 md:col-span-8 lg:col-span-9 h-[85vh] flex flex-col
spacing_and_layout.sidebar: col-span-1 md:col-span-4 lg:col-span-3 h-[85vh] flex flex-col gap-6
spacing_and_layout.surface_rules: Containers with borders must use p-6 or p-8 internal padding. Use rounded-3xl for the main chat card, rounded-2xl for message bubbles and job cards.

job_card_inline.style: Glassmorphism panel inserted directly into the chat flow.
job_card_inline.layout: Flex column with header (Logo + Title), metadata row (Location, Salary, Experience), and action footer.

motion.message_entrance: Framer Motion: initial={opacity: 0, y: 10}, animate={opacity: 1, y: 0}
motion.glass_glow: Animate box-shadow on hover for primary CTAs.

background_textures.usage: Use as a fixed background for the app body with opacity-20 to provide subtle texture behind the dark mode.

company_logos.usage: AI system avatar or partner logo

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='chat-input', data-testid='job-card-apply').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts from Google Fonts: Outfit, Plus Jakarta Sans, JetBrains Mono.
Implement the layout as Chat-First: The main view is the chat interface. Do not wrap this in a traditional admin dashboard layout.
The Chat Card must use high-end glassmorphism: bg-black/20, backdrop-blur-2xl, and a very subtle purple/blue border.
Job Cards are NOT on a separate grid page initially; they are rendered INLINE within the chat flow as the AI responds.
Implement the /jobs/:jobId workspace as a detailed overlay or split view with a Success Probability Ring (use Recharts).
Ensure all Shadcn components (buttons, inputs) are heavily customized to remove the default 'Vercel white/gray' look, using the deep dark mode palette.
Never use pure black #000000. Use #050505 or #0A0A0A. Never use pure white for borders, use rgba(255,255,255,0.08).
